title: lasinia mollis
intro: Lasinia mollis, also known as Lasiandra mollis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects. Herbal preparations of Lasinia mollis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
